summary: A Go-based monolithic testing and validation framework featuring a runner, schema validation, MCP handlers, and extensive agent-generated test suites.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated 'extra-tests' directories suggests potential test bloat or brittle CI pipelines
Uncommitted modified and staged files (2 modified, 1 staged) indicate incomplete work or context switching
Heavy reliance on agent-generated test files (glm-agents) may lead to maintenance overhead and hard-to-debug tests
suggestions: Consolidate or clean up the numerous GOrchestra agent-generated test directories to reduce repository clutter
Commit or stash the currently modified/staged files to maintain a clean working tree
Review the quality and necessity of agent-generated tests to ensure they provide actual value over noise
